nonBlockingIssues.description: SMTP validation description says SmtpPropertiesValidator 'logs a warning' but actual code throws IllegalStateException (crashing app) in production when SMTP config is incomplete. Only logs/skips when erp.mail.enabled=false.

mail.enabled default discrepancy: EmailProperties class default is false, but @Value annotation default is true. Effective runtime default is true (Spring overrides), so doc is operationally correct, but the nuance could confuse maintainers reading source.
SALES module path prefixes use glob notation '/api/v1/credit/*' but ModuleGatingInterceptor only checks '/api/v1/credit/override-requests' and '/api/v1/credit/limit-requests' specifically.

appliedUpdates.description: Added tenant-runtime-dual-property-names.md noting that TenantRuntimeAccessService uses dot-separated property names (erp.tenant.runtime.default.max-concurrent-requests, default 0) vs TenantRuntimeEnforcementService uses hyphenated names (erp.tenant.runtime.default-max-concurrent-requests, default 200) — a potential confusion source for maintainers.

rejectedObservations.observation: Convention observation about freshness markers and VAL-PLAT-007 reference pattern
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented — this is the established mission convention, not new knowledge
